issue_title: fix(api): add bulk-archive-by-ids endpoint for board mass archive
issue_body_preview:
## Root Cause

The mass archive functionality in the VK board UI was calling a non-existent API endpoint `/api/tasks/bulk-archive-by-ids`. The endpoint existed only in the frontend code but was never implemented in the backend API router.

When users attempted to archive multiple tasks from the boar
test_description_zh: 在看板页面上选择多个任务，然后执行批量归档操作，观察归档是否成功完成以及任务卡片是否从看板中移除。
expected_result_zh: 选中多个任务后点击批量归档按钮，所有选中的任务应成功归档，任务卡片从看板视图中消失，不出现API错误提示，归档操作正常完成。
